surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-HEAR-UNKNOWN
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled hearing-status probe — no next-hearing date supplied
Controlled input construction: Test harness supplies no next-hearing date at all against its fixed controlled reference time.
Expected behaviour under test: Hearing status must read as unknown / not safely extracted — never inferred or invented.
